sqlMap.update:
update cpinfo set Status = #status#
,UserPass = #UserPass#
where AppId = #appId#
update cpinfo set SessionId = #SessionId# where AppId = #appId#
update cpinfo set ActualRemain = ActualRemain - #amount#, FrozenRemain = FrozenRemain + #amount# where AppId = #appId# and ActualRemain >= #amount#
update cpinfo set googleSecret = #googleSecret# where AppId = #appId#
update cpinfo set UserPass = #passwordNew# where AppId = #appId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT SUM(a.Amount) AS 'totalPayAmount', SUM(a.PlatformFee) AS 'totalPayFee', COUNT(a.id) AS 'totalPayNum',
SUM(IF(a.PayTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL + 150 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00'), a.Amount, 0)) AS 'todayPayAmount', SUM(IF(a.PayTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL + 150 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00'), a.PlatformFee, 0)) AS 'todayPayFee', (SELECT COUNT(p.Id) FROM paylog p left join cpinfo c on p.AppId = c.AppId WHERE p.`Status` = 1 AND c.AppId != 10000 and p.AppId = #appId# AND PayTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL + 150 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00')) as 'todayPayNum',
SUM(IF(a.PayTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1290 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') AND a.PayTime < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL +0 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00'), a.Amount, 0)) AS 'yesterdayPayAmount', SUM(IF(a.PayTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1290 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') AND a.PayTime < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL +0 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00'), a.PlatformFee, 0)) AS 'yesterdayPayFee', (SELECT COUNT(p.Id) FROM paylog p left join cpinfo c on p.AppId = c.AppId WHERE p.`Status` = 1 AND c.AppId != 10000 and p.AppId = #appId# AND PayTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1290 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') AND PayTime < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL +0 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00')) as 'yesterdayPayNum'
FROM (SELECT id, p.appid, amount, paytime, platformfee, p.status, c.country FROM paylog p left join cpinfo c on p.AppId = c.AppId WHERE p.`Status` = 1 AND c.AppId != 10000 and p.AppId = #appId# ) a;

SELECT SUM(b.Amount) AS 'totalWithdrawAmount', SUM(b.PlatformFee) AS 'totalWithdrawFee', COUNT(b.id) AS 'totalWithdrawNum',
SUM(IF(b.CreateTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL + 150 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00'), b.Amount, 0)) AS 'todayWithdrawAmount', SUM(IF(b.CreateTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL + 150 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00'), b.PlatformFee, 0)) AS 'todayWithdrawFee', (SELECT COUNT(w.id) FROM withdrawlog w left join cpinfo c on w.AppId = c.AppId WHERE w.`Status` != -2 AND c.AppId != 10000 and c.AppId = #appId# AND CreateTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL + 150 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00')) as 'todayWithdrawNum',
SUM(IF(b.CreateTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1290 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') AND b.CreateTime < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL +0 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00'), b.Amount, 0)) AS 'yesterdayWithdrawAmount', SUM(IF(b.CreateTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1290 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') AND b.CreateTime < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL +0 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00'), b.PlatformFee, 0)) AS 'yesterdayWithdrawFee', (SELECT COUNT(w.Id) FROM withdrawlog w left join cpinfo c on w.AppId = c.AppId WHERE w.`Status` != -2 AND c.AppId != 10000 and c.AppId = #appId# AND CreateTime >= CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1290 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') AND CreateTime < CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL +0 MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00')) as 'yesterdayWithdrawNum'
FROM (SELECT id, w.amount, w.status, w.platformfee, w.CreateTime, c.AppId, c.country FROM withdrawlog w left join cpinfo c on w.AppId = c.AppId WHERE w.`Status` != -2 AND c.AppId != 10000 and c.AppId = #appId# ) b
